system.description: For better and worse, you fall in love extremely easily. You're constantly building a complicated web from your charm whether you're seeking new conquests, accidentally alluring, or just putting your heart before your head. We’re not entirely sure what’s going on with them. A notorious people pleaser, your keen attention to others' interests is an irreplaceable asset to any Field Team. The speed with which you form personal bonds is key in a line of work defined by earning and profiting from trust. Unfortunately, if left unsupervised, these bonds can cause you to become ensnared in complex emotional webs of your own design.

burnoutRelease.description: When you’re doing something that'll make you look more attractive or sympathetic, ignore all Burnout.

realityTrigger.description: You can't ignore an opportunity when you notice a Vibe., whether genuine or imagined. If you don't take your shot, you dwell on the missed connection and struggle to be present: the Relationship you're closest to something real with loses one Connection. When an existing relationship gets in the way of a new one, mark the track. When it's full, you finally find what you're looking for.

relationships.question2: Who has never, ever found you attractive?
relationships.question3: Who are you oblivious to the romantic possibilities with?
